chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO. S-145 OF 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge HEARING OF CASE. For hearing of main case 19.03.2025. Mr. Zafar Ali Talpur, Advocate for Petitioners a/w Petitioners. Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh Mr. Safdar Ali Depar, AAG -x-x-x-x-x- The Petitioners were granted protection by this Court vide Order dated 26.02.2025. Notices were directed against the Respondent Nos.7 and 8 but none of them has appeared. The official Respondents, the SHO of Police Station Steel Town, Karachi, SDPO Bin Qasim Sub Division [District Malir], Karachi, SSP Tando Adam City and SSP Sanghar have filed Statements and undertaken to provide protection to the Petitioners. The learned counsel for the Petitioners is satisfied and seeks the disposal of this Petition in line with the statements filed by the Official Respondents. Order accordingly, the instant Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Jamil
